entries.title: Command Latency Reduction Using Runtime Telemetry
entries.summary: Uses the new local runtime telemetry to profile, prioritize, and reduce command latency across host, reusable core, and pack-owned paths.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Validated and benchmarked latency reductions on the final optimized tree.

entries.title: Copy-Forward Pack Runtime Hardening
entries.summary: Hardens reusable core for copied-core host scenarios by discovering unbootstrapped hosted packs from manifests, structuring stale-registry failures, and keeping current shared workspace contracts explicit.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Implemented copied-core bootstrap-mode pack discovery and structured runtime hardening in reusable core.

entries.title: Core Copy Forward Operating Mode Documentation
entries.summary: Document that downstream WatchTower repositories may consume the shared core by copying core/ alone or alongside one or more hosted packs.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Documented copy-forward core adoption and donor-neutral shared-core guidance.

entries.title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
entries.summary: Separates reusable core, host composition, and pack-native runtime behind governed pack contracts, host-owned CLI composition, and pack interface validation.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the core-host-pack boundary split, namespaced host CLI, pack contracts, validation guards, and closeout cleanup.

entries.title: Core Portability Follow-up Root Pack And Query Typing
entries.summary: Cleans up copied-core portability debt in shared help, command docs, tests, and host query typing without changing WatchTowerPlan's current steady-state plan workspace contract.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Updated shared core to present first-party root packs as the default example topology, aligned generic portability tests with root-pack defaults, and cleared the remaining host query mypy backlog.

entries.title: Core Removable Plan Reference Cleanup
entries.summary: Removes non-essential plan-specific wording and examples from shared core docs, host help, and reusable-core boundaries while preserving only references required by the current repository contract.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Removed non-essential plan references from shared core while preserving current-repo facts and required pack-owned surfaces.

entries.title: Core Shared Language Deplanification
entries.summary: Removes WatchTowerPlan and plan-flavored wording from shared core standards, registries, and reusable-core READMEs so core authority stays pack-neutral.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Normalized shared-core language and validated the governed surfaces.

entries.title: Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
entries.summary: Proves that plan and future domain packs can be copied out with only packaging and path updates while reusable core and host integration remain stable.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Validated the portable pack capsule contract, proved plan and second-pack externalization, and published externalized pack authoring guidance.

entries.title: First-Party Root Pack Roots
entries.summary: Implement first-party root-pack discovery and default-pack resolution so copied repositories can host packs at <slug>/ without donor assumptions.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Implemented deterministic first-party root-pack discovery and validated root-pack host/core/pack interaction.

entries.title: Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
entries.summary: Brings WatchTowerOversight to host-layer parity, turns pack starter templates into scaffoldable operator surfaces, and flattens remaining plan runtime adapters.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Aligned WatchTowerOversight to the host layer, shipped hosted-pack scaffolding, flattened plan workspace services into a feature-owned package, and validated the tranche.

entries.title: Ledger Retirement Contract Change
entries.summary: Retire remaining ledger-authority dependencies through one governed contract change without breaking validation, command, or documentation contracts.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Retired the live ledger surface family in favor of retained records, updated contracts and governed artifacts, and validated the repository end to end.

entries.title: Pack Bootstrap Installation Contract
entries.summary: Turns hosted-pack scaffold output into a safe registration and shared-workspace installation flow.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered guarded pack bootstrap registration flow and validated shared workspace wiring.

entries.title: Pack CLI Fault Isolation Hardening
entries.summary: Keep pack validate, pack describe, and CLI startup usable when a registered hosted pack is malformed or partially bootstrapped.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered and validated host CLI fault isolation hardening for broken hosted-pack integrations.

entries.title: Pack Domain Hardcoding Remediation
entries.summary: Verify and remove remaining pack-domain hardcoding, reorganize lingering legacy artifacts, and prove the pack-driven endstate.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Removed remaining pack-domain hardcoding from reusable core, moved plan-domain runtime under plan/python, and validated the pack-driven endstate.

entries.title: Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment
entries.summary: Publishes reusable hosted-pack starter templates and aligns WatchTowerOversight to the shared core-host-pack contract.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Published hosted-pack starter templates, aligned WatchTowerOversight to the shared runtime-manifest contract, and validated adoption across both repositories.

entries.title: Plan Python Package Dependency Cleanup
entries.summary: Make plan/python an installable workspace package and remove the last repo-local import shim from reusable core.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Installed watchtower_plan through the shared workspace, removed repo-local path bootstrapping, and validated the final boundary split.

entries.title: Requirements And Decisions Adherence Remediation
entries.summary: Retire the root docs tree, finish the initiative-package hard cutover, and restore rich machine-backed documentation surfaces.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Retired root docs, completed the initiative-package hard cutover, restored rich rendered surfaces, and validated the repository.

entries.title: Plan Task Tracking Sync Performance
entries.summary: Reduce the coordination rebuild cost caused by repeated live task-state loading during plan write commands.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Removed repeated task-state and validator rebuild hot paths so plan coordination writes return to operational latency.

entries.title: Remaining Dirty Tranche Closeout
entries.summary: Inventories the remaining dirty worktree, lands the validated slices as coherent commits, and returns the repository to a clean state.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Landed the retained-records runtime tranche, reconciled the foundations and governance surfaces, and returned the repository to a clean validated state.

entries.title: Repository Tech Debt Reduction Program
entries.summary: Makes tech-debt reduction the active repository priority, starting with legacy residue removal, integration-tail reduction, and stale compatibility cleanup across core, host, and pack-owned code.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the first repository tech-debt tranche across test runtime, stale compatibility cleanup, and validator authority deduplication

entries.title: Root Pack Schema Catalog Contract Alignment
entries.summary: Extends the reusable-core schema catalog canonical-path contract to support first-party root pack machine roots such as <pack>/.wt without donor-specific exceptions.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Implemented donor-neutral schema-catalog canonical-path support for first-party root packs and validated it with reusable-core unit and CLI regression coverage.

entries.title: Runtime Telemetry And Command Observability Foundation
entries.summary: Adds default-on local runtime telemetry, timing, and error tracing across host, reusable-core, and plan command paths without adopting OTEL yet.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered runtime telemetry across host, reusable core, and plan command paths and validated the tranche.

entries.title: Test Suite Efficiency And Redundancy Reduction
entries.summary: Profiles the Python test suite, removes redundant or low-signal cases, and reduces expensive setup and execution paths while preserving behavioral coverage.
entries.next_action: No further default action. Initiative is completed.
entries.closure_reason: Reduced the Python suite from a non-finishing >28 minute baseline to a validated 19m46s full run by collapsing redundant CLI coverage, caching expensive integration baselines, and trimming repeated coordination rebuild work.
